hooks.title: AI Dev OS: Guideline Quick Check
hooks.description: Performs a lightweight guideline compliance check when code files are saved
hooks.instructions: Skip files in node_modules/, dist/, build/, .next/, __pycache__/, .venv/, vendor/ directories. If the target file matches an AI Dev OS guideline pattern, perform a quick compliance check on the changes. Only flag clear violations, and explain the reason. For minor warnings, mention them briefly without blocking.

hooks.title: AI Dev OS: Pre-commit Reminder
hooks.description: Reminds to run guideline check before committing
hooks.instructions: Remind the user: Please run a guideline check before committing. Use #ai-dev-os-check in chat to verify compliance.

hooks.title: AI Dev OS: Layer Dependency Check
hooks.description: Warns about dependency rule violations when L1-L2 files are saved
hooks.instructions: Check if the saved file violates AI Dev OS dependency rules. L1 philosophy files must not contain tool-specific terms (Kiro, Claude Code, Cursor, etc.). L2 principle files must not contain framework-specific implementation details. Warn the user if violations are found.

hooks.title: AI Dev OS: Implementation Plan Suggestion
hooks.description: Suggests using #ai-dev-os-plan when implementation-related prompts are detected
hooks.command: bash -c 'INPUT=$(cat); PROMPT=$(echo "$INPUT" | jq -r ".prompt"); if echo "$PROMPT" | grep -qiE "(implement|create|add|build|develop|refactor|fix).*(feature|function|module|component|endpoint|api|service|page)"; then echo "{\"additionalContext\": \"For guideline-aware implementation, consider using #ai-dev-os-plan to create a plan with compliance checklists before coding.\"}"; fi'

hooks.title: AI Dev OS: Rule Extraction Suggestion
hooks.description: Suggests using #ai-dev-os-extract when guideline-related changes are discussed
hooks.command: bash -c 'INPUT=$(cat); PROMPT=$(echo "$INPUT" | jq -r ".prompt"); if echo "$PROMPT" | grep -qiE "(rule|guideline).*(add|change|delete|modify)"; then echo "{\"additionalContext\": \"AI Dev OS guideline change detected. Use #ai-dev-os-extract to extract rules via the Rule Harvesting.\"}"; fi'
